name: farm-auction
description: TractorZoom Farm Equipment Auction — Salesforce DX take-home

scripts.org:create: sf org create scratch -f config/project-scratch-def.json -a FarmAuction -y 7 -d
scripts.org:push: sf project deploy start --manifest manifest/package.xml --target-org FarmAuction
scripts.org:forcePush: sf project deploy start --manifest manifest/package.xml --target-org FarmAuction --ignore-conflicts
scripts.org:setup: npm run org:create && npm run org:push && npm run org:seed && sf org open --target-org FarmAuction
